'''Stonias Leem''' was a being that was a representative of [[Tendrando Arms]] on [[Drewwa]] who was presented with the [[Amulet of Kalara]] by the victors of the [[Insurrection of Iliabath]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Exile]]'' {{1stm}}
